prompt: Three stacked glowing layers representing three knowledge carriers: an always-on rules tablet at top, modular skill blocks in the middle, and open article pages at the bottom, all connected by light lines converging toward a small AI core. Dark gradient background, tech / developer aesthetic, conceptual visualization, no text, no letters, no words, no watermark. Cohesive palette: deep indigo, teal, soft cyan glow, subtle warm gold accents.
